final_answer: Based on the evidence, 1 audience(s) match: Gender: Male mapped to amazon-s3. Live api verification was not executed because adobe credentials are unavailable.
original_query: List all audiences in the sandbox that have been mapped to new destinations in the last 3 months.

risk_notes: Audience APIs can be paginated; avoid assuming first page is exhaustive.
candidate_apis.use_when: List or look up Real-Time CDP audiences and audience metadata/counts.

risk_notes: Definition IDs and audience IDs are related but not always identical.
candidate_apis.use_when: Look up segment definitions, names, statuses, and segment metadata.
List/count Real-Time Customer Profile merge policies.
List segment evaluation jobs and statuses.

steps.rationale: Use SQL first for entity grounding, then API only for live/platform state or status verification.

steps.purpose: Ground names/IDs in local snapshot before API verification.
steps.sql: SELECT DISTINCT A."SEGMENTID" AS segment_id, A."NAME" AS segment_name, D."TARGETID" AS target_id, D."NAME" AS target_name FROM "dim_segment" AS A JOIN "hkg_br_segment_target" AS AD ON A."SEGMENTID" = AD."SEGMENTID" JOIN "dim_target" AS D ON AD."TARGETID" = D."TARGETID" WHERE D."CREATEDTIME" >= DATEADD(MONTH, -3, CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 3

result.original_sql: SELECT DISTINCT A."SEGMENTID" AS segment_id, A."NAME" AS segment_name, D."TARGETID" AS target_id, D."NAME" AS target_name FROM "dim_segment" AS A JOIN "hkg_br_segment_target" AS AD ON A."SEGMENTID" = AD."SEGMENTID" JOIN "dim_target" AS D ON AD."TARGETID" = D."TARGETID" WHERE D."CREATEDTIME" >= DATEADD(MONTH, -3, CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 3
result.sql: SELECT DISTINCT A."SEGMENTID" AS segment_id, A."NAME" AS segment_name, D."TARGETID" AS target_id, D."NAME" AS target_name FROM "dim_segment" AS A JOIN "hkg_br_segment_target" AS AD ON A."SEGMENTID" = AD."SEGMENTID" JOIN "dim_target" AS D ON AD."TARGETID" = D."TARGETID" WHERE TRY_CAST(D."CREATEDTIME" AS TIMESTAMP) >= (CURRENT_DATE + (-3) * INTERVAL '1 month') LIMIT 3

steps.sql: SELECT DISTINCT A."SEGMENTID" AS segment_id, A."NAME" AS segment_name, D."TARGETID" AS target_id, D."NAME" AS target_name FROM "dim_segment" AS A JOIN "hkg_br_segment_target" AS AD ON A."SEGMENTID" = AD."SEGMENTID" JOIN "dim_target" AS D ON AD."TARGETID" = D."TARGETID" WHERE D."CREATEDTIME" >= DATEADD(MONTH, -3, CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 3

result.error: Adobe credentials unavailable; API call not executed.
